stemHtml: How can you distinguish between an "armed" and an "engaged" mode on the Flight Mode Annunciator (FMA)? The caption…

options.a: Changes in colour or in font size, or becomes surrounded by a box.
options.b: Is accompanied by a horn sound that lasts for two seconds.
options.c: Activates the stick shaker for three seconds.
options.d: Is accompanied by a single gong sound.
